title: Sorta Vanilla
body:
A modpack that keeps the vanilla feel of the game while adding some extra progression, optimization, difficulty, and QOL.

Best used with the "Draconic Ascension" data pack:
https://modrinth.com/datapack/draconic-ascension/version/1.0

Required on both server and client-side.

I do not take credit for making any of these mods. They were all created by their respective owners. You can view what mods I added in the in-game mod menu.
